sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 298 of 2022 ITRA 299 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.27. 2. For orders on CMA No.362/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 13.11.2025 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant. On the last date, following order was passed: “06.11.2025 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate for applicant. Learned counsel is confronted as to how this reference can be entertained in view of the Supreme Court judgment in the case of Millat Tractors Limited reported as 2024 SCMR 700. To come up on 13.11.2025. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected file.” Today counsel states that issue is covered as aforesaid, therefore, reference applications may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
